PORTLAND, Dec. 27.-U. s. inn
migration officials have reported to
the local police that large numbers
of fallen women driven from Ca
madam cities by Dominion police
are fiocking into Portland. The po-
lice plan to take steps to exclude
these undesirables.


TO RESUME RATE HEARING.


OLYMPIA, Dec. 27.-The state
railroad commission, Dec. 80, will
resume the hearings begun last
summer ON the cost of railroad
property and its value and will COM
plete the hearing at this time. The
hearing was to have been begun
Dec. 26, but was changed to the
later date at the request of the
railroads.


The railroads have filed exception
to the rules and regulations govern
ing passenger transportation which
the commission promulgated.
